summary: Made one surgical exit-continuity edit. The chapter opening already carried chapter 10's end-state cleanly and remained structurally distinct from chapter 12's opening, so the only change was to seed Micah's next-morning school-office errand and bus-fare arithmetic in the final paragraph.
edits: Added a closing line that sets aside Micah's bus fare and extra dollar for the school office in the morning, smoothing the handoff into chapter 12.
